Binance Mulls Shuttering Relationship With US-Based Businesses
articles.description: Summary: Binance Holding Ltd is reassessing its position in the U.S. and could cut ties with its partner firms in the jurisdiction amid mounting regulatory pressure, Bloomberg reported. The news comes a few days after Paxos, the issuer of BUSD, was served a Wells notice and ordered to stop minting new BUSD tokens. Friday’s report noted that Binance US does not plan to exit the country yet. ...
